title: Shattering Fish Tagine
description: A flavorful Moroccan-inspired dish featuring fish cooked in a rich and aromatic tagine sauce.

ingredients.name: Tagine Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the Middle Eastern Spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Eastern Lemon juice, Olives, and Tagine Spice Mix.
Stir to combine, then cover the tagine and simmer for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Season with Salt and Black Pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
